audit.title: Conversion Psychology, Behavioral UX, and Revenue Experience Audit

methodNotes.screenshotFailureReason: Playwright Chromium install failed in PRoot Ubuntu because the available chromium package is a snap stub; Firefox unavailable. Visual findings are derived from source code, component layout, and live API probes.

executive.largestTrustRisk: Live Square catalog returns Unnamed Product at $0; checkout pricing cannot be trusted.
executive.largestClarityRisk: Homepage hero offers three competing CTAs including non-functional SMS capture before establishing the product.
executive.largestMobileRisk: Hero stacks three full-width CTAs, pushing product proof below the fold.
executive.largestRevenueOpportunity: Fix Square catalog reconciliation and simplify homepage to single product-forward CTA.
executive.largestRetentionOpportunity: Operationalize a single honest email waitlist; defer SMS and rewards until built.

scorecard.mainWeakness: No single dominant action; first CTA promises unavailable SMS channel
Wellness tag dominates; flavor/type not instantly clear
Homepage buries founder story below many sections
Stock/repeated imagery, no real product photos
Three hero CTAs compete; vague Shop This Week
Desktop header has 6 items + login + cart; quiz feels out of place
Weekly menu, catalog, shop, preorder, bundles overlap
Hero has 3 stacked buttons; long scroll to products
Malformed Tailwind classes and custom bracket syntax
Square catalog $0 issue undermines price trust
No real reviews shown on homepage
Preorder pulls from broken Square catalog
SMS, bundles, rewards, workshops advertised as live
SMS not operational; no real loyalty program

p0Findings.title: Square catalog items unnamed and $0
p0Findings.evidence: GET /api/catalog returns 15+ items with name 'Unnamed Product' and price 0
p0Findings.impact: Checkout may charge $0 or fail; displayed prices do not match payment provider
p0Findings.recommendation: Pass curated data/products.ts prices as base line items to Square checkout until Square catalog is cleaned

p0Findings.title: Square catalog API crashes on BigInt
p0Findings.evidence: GET /api/storefront/square-catalog returns 'Cannot mix BigInt and other types, use explicit conversions'
p0Findings.impact: Direct Square SDK catalog path is non-functional
p0Findings.recommendation: Convert BigInt priceMoney.amount to Number before JSON.stringify

p0Findings.title: Homepage hero has three competing CTAs
p0Findings.evidence: components/home/HomePageClient.jsx renders 'Get Menu Texts', 'Shop This Week', 'Take the Wellness Quiz' with similar visual weight
p0Findings.impact: New visitor does not know what to click first; first CTA is non-functional SMS
p0Findings.recommendation: Single primary CTA 'View this week's menu'; move SMS and quiz to later sections

p0Findings.title: High-risk product names imply therapeutic benefits
p0Findings.evidence: data/products.ts contains 'Grateful Defense' and 'Healing Harmony Gel'
p0Findings.recommendation: Rename to flavor-forward names: 'Ginger Turmeric Shot' and 'Turmeric Spice Sea Moss Gel'

p1Findings.title: Bundles advertise savings without real Square SKUs
p1Findings.evidence: data/bundles.ts uses checkoutMode 'square-compatible-placeholder' and savingsText referencing future Square setup
p1Findings.recommendation: Remove placeholder savings text or hide bundles until SKUs exist

p1Findings.title: FAQ advertises inactive rewards, workshops, Spin & Win
p1Findings.evidence: app/faq/page.js contains sections for Gratitude Passport, Spin & Win, workshops, challenges
p1Findings.recommendation: Remove or rewrite as honest waitlist

p1Findings.title: Gratitude Box page says subscription but is one-time/waitlist
p1Findings.evidence: app/subscriptions/gratitude-box/page.tsx title 'Weekly subscription waitlist' while route creates a single Square payment link
p1Findings.recommendation: Rename consistently to 'Gratitude Box pilot / waitlist'

p1Findings.title: Quiz maps health goals to products
p1Findings.evidence: data/quiz.ts asks 'What are you looking for support with?' with digestion, immunity, weight support options
p1Findings.recommendation: Reframe quiz around flavor, format, pickup preference

p1Findings.title: Wellness tags on product cards imply structure/function claims
SMS capture promises delivery that is not operational
p1Findings.evidence: lib/sms.ts skips sends when Twilio credentials absent; homepage hero says 'Get Menu Texts'
p1Findings.recommendation: Rewrite as email waitlist with honest SMS note

p1Findings.title: Founder story implies product caused health recovery
p1Findings.evidence: app/about/page.js states 'I started feeling better... That's how Taste of Gratitude was born'

p1Findings.title: Generic placeholder quotes used as social proof
p1Findings.evidence: components/home/HomePageClient.jsx contains hardcoded customer quotes without attribution
p1Findings.recommendation: Remove or replace with verified reviews

quickWins: Remove leftover .bak files from working tree
Rename high-risk products to flavor-forward names
Rewrite SMS copy as honest waitlist
Uncheck SMS opt-in default in quiz
Rename Gratitude Box to pilot/waitlist consistently
Simplify homepage hero to single primary CTA
Add size to product-card price line
Replace repeated hero image in founder section

quickWinsImplemented: Remove leftover .bak files from working tree
Delete duplicate admin page files (kept .tsx versions)
Rename high-risk products to flavor-forward names (slug preserved)
Gratitude Box renamed to pilot/waitlist consistently
Homepage hero simplified to single product-forward CTA
Homepage SMS card converted to honest email waitlist
Remove generic community proof placeholder quotes
Simplify retention prompts to single email waitlist
About page: soften unsubstantiated wildcrafted sourcing claim
Remove unsupported nutrient keywords from health-benefit taxonomy

verification.screenshots: could not capture; no working headless browser in PRoot
